context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the benchee-profiling instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Identify the bottleneck** — confirm the slow call site before writing any benchmarks; if the profile output is ambiguous, re-run with a larger workload to amplify signal

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Write a comparative Benchee benchmark** — implement at least 2 alternative approaches

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Save baseline** — write results to `bench/baseline.json` and check for regressions (>10% threshold); if a regression is detected, compare against the previous 3 baseline runs before raising an error to rule out noise

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: time: 10,              # Run each scenario for 10 seconds

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: ├── suite.exs                 # Run all benchmarks
